postings: Mistral AI is actively recruiting talent for a range of machine‑learning‑focused positions, including Applied AI Engineer (also titled Forward‑Deployed Machine‑Learning Engineer) roles in Marseille, Luxembourg and New York City that require a PhD or master’s in AI or data science, 2+ years of experience as a data‑science or software‑engineer contributor, deep expertise in fine‑tuning large language models, retrieval‑augmented generation or agentic use‑cases, and strong Python, PyTorch, LangChain and vector‑database skills, as well as the ability to guide customers through onboarding, prompting, evaluation and production integration; an AI Scientist internship in Palo Alto targeting PhD‑level candidates who will work on state‑of‑the‑art LLM pre‑training and fine‑tuning, conduct research, design and implement ML models, and navigate the full MLOps stack; and a Research Engineer, Machine‑Learning position that sits within research squads to build and optimise large‑scale learning systems for open‑weight models, requiring 4+ years of large‑scale ML code experience, deep learning/NLP/LLM knowledge and preferably CUDA or data‑pipeline expertise.
velocity: Mistral AI is actively hiring for several AI‑focused roles, including Machine Learning Engineer (Open‑Source Software) in Paris/London, Applied AI Engineer and Forward‑Deployed Machine Learning Engineer for the EMEA region, as well as technical lead positions in applied AI; all of these positions are listed as full‑time, on‑site or hybrid opportunities across its hubs in Paris, London, Palo Alto, and other European locations.
